title: Wire useKiokuSearch into tasks/index.vue search bar
acceptance_criteria: The search input element has v-model bound to the query ref from useKiokuSearch.
A computed displayedTasks returns kiokuSearch.results.tasks when query is non-empty, otherwise falls back to vault.tasks from the read model.
A loading spinner or 'Searching…' label is visible in the task list area when kiokuSearch.pending is true.
An inline error message is shown below the search bar when kiokuSearch.error is non-null.
The existing task list rendering loop (v-for) iterates over displayedTasks, not the original unfiltered vault.tasks.
bun run typecheck exits with code 0 — no TypeScript errors introduced.
All previously passing tests in bun test still pass (no regressions).
completion_summary: Wired the tasks page search bar to useKiokuSearch, switched list and kanban rendering to displayedTasks, and surfaced searching and error states inline.
